# Ali Waris | Associate Full Stack Developer

> Portfolio of Ali Waris, a Full Stack Developer specializing in React, Vue, Node.js, FastAPI, and scalable web applications. Based in Lahore, Pakistan.

## Navigation

- [Home](https://aliwaris.netlify.app/)
- [About](https://aliwaris.netlify.app/#about)
- [Projects](https://aliwaris.netlify.app/#projects)
- [Services](https://aliwaris.netlify.app/#services)
- [Contact](https://aliwaris.netlify.app/#contact)
- [GitHub Activity](https://aliwaris.netlify.app/#githubstats)
- [Download CV](https://aliwaris.netlify.app/cv.pdf)

## Projects

- [Moodflik](https://www.moodflik.com/) - Full-stack web & mobile application for personalized content engagement. Built with responsive UIs and integrated APIs.
- [SeniorThrive](https://seniorthrive.com/) - Healthcare SaaS platform supporting senior wellness with dashboard workflows, questionnaires, and profile management.
- [Nexus E-Commerce](https://github.com/Aliwaris512) - Modern headless e-commerce storefront with real-time inventory tracking, Stripe payments, and animated product showcases.
- [Student Portal - Superior University](https://github.com/Aliwaris512) - University portal with student/teacher dashboards, role-based access, JWT auth, and REST API integration.
- [Taskify Kanban](https://github.com/Aliwaris512) - Collaborative workflow management with drag-and-drop interfaces, real-time sync, and team permissions.
- [Expense Tracker](https://github.com/Aliwaris512) - Expense tracking app built with Vue 3 Composition API and reactive state management.
- [AI Code Companion](https://github.com/Aliwaris512) - AI-powered developer tool for automatic code formatting and boilerplate generation in the browser.

## Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** React, Next.js, Vue.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, HTML, CSS, React Native
- **Backend:** Node.js, Express, Python, FastAPI, Django, REST APIs, GraphQL
- **Database & Auth:** MySQL, JWT Authentication
- **Tools:** Git, Postman, Figma, VS Code
